title: Mob Stacker: Farming
body:
Adds support for mod logic to properly handle stacks of animals from [Mob Stacker](https://modrinth.com/mod/mob-stacker) + [Integration](https://modrinth.com/mod/mob-stacker-integration), implements the most correct interaction with the stack.\
For example, sheep shearing will work taking into account the number of sheep in the stack.
